intro: Over the two weeks from April 13 to 2026, ZCyberNews published 22 articles on cloud security, with a severity mix of 13 high, 3 informational, and 2 critical reports. The threat actor APT41 was observed, and the top vulnerability was CVE-2026-33413 (CVSS 8.8). Affected sectors included technology, government, healthcare, cloud services, and cloud-services, while the impacted regions were Global and Israel.
